requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2

summary.en: Equatorial Guinea is a Hispanophone Central African market with Spanish/IEC electrical legacy, not an Americas J1772 market. For new IEC-aligned EV infrastructure, AC charging should be specified around IEC 62196-2 Type 2 and DC charging around IEC 62196-3 CCS Combo 2 (CCS2), unless a project owner explicitly specifies a different vehicle fleet. Connector choice must be confirmed in the tender or site specification because the national EV market is nascent and installed public charging infrastructure is limited.
summary.zh: 赤道几内亚是西班牙语中非市场，具有西班牙/IEC电气传统，不应按美洲J1772市场处理。对于新的IEC体系电动汽车基础设施，交流充电宜按IEC 62196-2 Type 2指定，直流充电宜按IEC 62196-3 CCS Combo 2（CCS2）指定，除非项目业主明确指定不同车辆车队。由于国家电动汽车市场仍处早期且公共充电基础设施有限，接口选择必须在招标或现场规范中确认。
summary.zht: 赤道幾內亞是西班牙語中非市場，具有西班牙/IEC電氣傳統，不應按美洲J1772市場處理。對於新的IEC體系電動汽車基礎設施，交流充電宜按IEC 62196-2 Type 2指定，直流充電宜按IEC 62196-3 CCS Combo 2（CCS2）指定，除非項目業主明確指定不同車輛車隊。由於國家電動汽車市場仍處早期且公共充電基礎設施有限，接口選擇必須在招標或現場規範中確認。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 — Type 2 AC vehicle coupler dimensional compatibility
IEC 62196-3 — CCS Combo 2 DC vehicle coupler dimensional compatibility
IEC 61851-1 — conductive charging system general requirements
IEC 61851-23 and IEC 61851-24 — DC charging and digital communication context

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and China DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers with GB/T 27930 DC communication. GB/T AC and DC connector hardware is not physically interchangeable with IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 infrastructure, and the DC communication stack is different. A charger built only for GB/T connector geometry cannot serve IEC Type 2 / CCS2 vehicles without hardware and protocol redesign.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，中国直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器并配套GB/T 27930直流通信。GB/T交流和直流接口硬件与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2基础设施不能物理互换，直流通信栈也不同。仅按GB/T接口几何结构制造的充电桩，若不进行硬件和协议重新设计，无法服务IEC Type 2 / CCS2车辆。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，中國直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器並配套GB/T 27930直流通訊。GB/T交流和直流接口硬件與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2基礎設施不能物理互換，直流通訊棧也不同。僅按GB/T接口幾何結構製造的充電樁，若不進行硬體和協議重新設計，無法服務IEC Type 2 / CCS2車輛。

gap.en: Do not ship a GB/T-only connector configuration unless the buyer has explicitly confirmed a GB/T vehicle fleet. For a normal IEC-aligned Equatorial Guinea project, redesign the cable assembly, inlet/outlet, locking device, proximity pilot/control pilot signalling, CCS2 DC communication, labels, spare parts, and temperature-rise evidence around IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2. Adapters should not be treated as the compliance strategy for public or commercial installations.
gap.zh: 除非买方已明确确认使用GB/T车辆车队，否则不应发送仅支持GB/T接口的配置。对于通常的IEC体系赤道几内亚项目，应围绕IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2重新设计电缆组件、插座/插头、锁止装置、接近导引/控制导引信号、CCS2直流通信、标签、备件和温升证据。转接器不应作为公共或商业安装的合规策略。
gap.zht: 除非買方已明確確認使用GB/T車輛車隊，否則不應發送僅支持GB/T接口的配置。對於通常的IEC體系赤道幾內亞項目，應圍繞IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2重新設計電纜組件、插座/插頭、鎖止裝置、接近導引/控制導引信號、CCS2直流通訊、標籤、備件和溫升證據。轉接器不應作為公共或商業安裝的合規策略。

mandatory_status.target: Project mandatory where IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 is specified by the buyer, site owner, utility reviewer, or vehicle fleet; GB/T connector substitution is physically incompatible
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Equatorial Guinea as IEC Type 2 / CCS2 direction unless the project explicitly says otherwise. GB/T 20234 connector hardware and GB/T 27930 DC communication are not accepted substitutes for IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 interoperability.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 除非项目明确另有规定，应按IEC Type 2 / CCS2方向处理赤道几内亚。GB/T 20234接口硬件和GB/T 27930直流通信不能替代IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2互操作要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 除非項目明確另有規定，應按IEC Type 2 / CCS2方向處理赤道幾內亞。GB/T 20234接口硬件和GB/T 27930直流通訊不能替代IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2互操作要求。
